title: Revamped Repairs
description: This mod allows for an early-game alternative to mending, that keeps enchantments and does not use any ores for repairs. It also introduces the EXP Crystals that allow for the crafting of the modded items, and allow for faster collection of xp.
body:
### **❕This mod is under development. Future versions may include more features, and you may experience bugs.**

## 🎯Easy Repairs

Easy Repairs is a mod that allows for a much easier repair process for your tools. It keeps enchants and works similar to mending, but without enchants.

New crystals are added to be used in crafting, and make XP collection easier.

## ✨ Recipies and Usage

To repair your tools, you will need a tool core, your respective tool, and at least one level of experience.

You can then put these ingredients into your Forge, a new workbench designed to repair your tools.

Your forge can be crafted with 3 iron ingots, one exp crystal, and 5 of any wood plank.

![3 iron ingots at the top, a yellow exp crystal in the center, and 5 wood planks in the remaining spaces.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d14f8ea38374e7cc7a142b984953839e0065a929.png)

### Each core recipe will be found below



**Sword:**

![2 crystals in the top middle and center, and an iron ingot in the bottom middle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ab5a490ba7529ffcd5bc60dc50a3c60fa2f313.png)

**Pickaxe:**

![3 Smooth stone in the top row, a crystal in the center, and an iron ingot in the bottem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/062325c0f4d3fc9b34f405ec10ca515ea8d71e1a.png)

**Axe:**

![3 smooth stone in the top left, top middle, and left middle. One exp crystal in the center, and an iron ingot in the bottom center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77608240eda217bacf1c88a0b021678efdb7bec2.png)

**Shovel:**

![One iron ingot in the bottom middle, an exp crystal in the center, and a smooth stone in the top middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07be658bbe117b1d2715bfa67c481d20ada6ac6.png)

**Hoe:**

![2 smooth stones in the top left and top middle. one exp crystal in the center, and an iron ingot in the bottom middle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1da24d021ada0f090d0780246ad2414f0328f6ce.png)



When forging your repaired tool, the tool in the output may not appear enchanted. Dont worry! It is, when you take it out of the slot it will gain the enchantment. Every time you repair a tool, your tool cores will get damaged too, but will not be used during crafting.

### Feel free to leave suggestions in the comments!


## ❤️Thank you for choosing this mod!
